MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PACIFIC MAT & COMMERCIAL FLOORING'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER OF DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL RUG AND CARPET CORPORATION is granted. No opposition filed. Court enters default in plaintiff's favor. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC MAT & COMMERCIAL FLOORING, A CORPORATION Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $520, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspections Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC MAT & COMMERCIAL FLOORING, A CORPORATION's Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $560, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
